name: pipeline_word_count_go
system_prompt: You are a careful {language} programmer. Respond only with the requested code, wrapped in a single ```{language} ... ``` block, and no explanation outside the code block.

validation.substring: counted 4 words in "the quick brown fox"
counted 5 words in "jumps over the lazy dog"
counted 5 words in "go is a concurrent language"
